summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FairCheck AI bias detection platform with all new features. Third iteration testing focused on Age & Education bias dimensions, Historical analysis tracking with compare mode, and Live Demo Walkthrough functionality. All backend APIs and frontend features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (200 OK)
Sample dataset endpoint with 24 records including Age and Education columns
Analyze sample endpoint returning age_stats and education_stats
NEW: Analysis history endpoint returning list of past analyses
NEW: Get analysis by ID endpoint returning specific analysis
CSV upload and analysis with age/education bias detection
PDF export including new age and education data
CSV export including new age and education data
Homepage hero section with all 4 buttons (Get Started, Try Demo, Walkthrough, History)
NEW: Live Demo Walkthrough button auto-scrolls through sections and navigates to demo
NEW: Age vs Hired chart displaying age brackets (Young 18-25, Mid 26-35, Senior 36-45)
NEW: Education Level vs Hired chart displaying education levels (Bachelor, Master, PhD)
NEW: Age bias detection alerts in analysis results
NEW: Education bias detection alerts in analysis results
Updated fairness score calculation including all 4 dimensions (21.9 score indicating bias)
NEW: History page showing list of past analyses with scores (44 analyses found)
NEW: Compare Mode toggle and selection functionality
NEW: Compare page with side-by-side comparison and disparity table
NEW: Disparity comparison table showing Gender, Income, Age, Education dimensions
Navigation between all pages (Home, Analysis, History, Compare)
History link in analysis page header
View Analysis History link on homepage
Export functionality working with new age/education data
Creators section visible with Gowtham K and Srushti B.S
